title: Dark Angels
name: Dark Angels
colorsString: Bone white & black (Ist Legion) / Dark green (current)
strength: Full chapter strength — Inner Circle vigilant
lore: The Ist Legion of Lion El'Jonson — the oldest and most secretive of all the First Founding Chapters. Their history is a palimpsest of redaction: what the Imperium knows of them is a fraction of what they know of themselves.

At the end of the Horus Heresy, Caliban was torn apart in a civil war between the Lion and Luther, his brother-in-arms. The fallen Dark Angels who sided with Luther were scattered across time and space by the Warp. They are known only as the Fallen — and hunting them is the Chapter's true crusade.

The Lion returned in the Era Indomitus, emerging from ten thousand years of hidden stasis. He walks again — but the Inner Circle's ancient shame has not been resolved, and the hunt for the Fallen continues as it always has.
